title: Midnight Craving American Corn Paella
description: A light and umami American dish featuring a corn arepa filled with mozzarella cheese, served on a wooden board.

ingredients.name: Corn Arepa Dough
ingredients.notes: Long-fermentation dough recipe available on request.

ingredients.name: Fresh Corn Kernels
ingredients.notes: Frozen or canned corn can be used as a substitute.

instructions: Caramelize the onions by cooking them in butter over low heat for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Prepare the corn arepa dough according to the long-fermentation recipe.
Shape the dough into small circles and bake on a wooden board in the preheated oven for 15 minutes, or until lightly toasted.
Grill sliced jalapeños until slightly charred, then chop into small pieces.
Melt mozzarella cheese in the oven or a microwave-safe bowl until lightly melted.
Place a cooked corn arepa on a wooden board, topping it with mozzarella cheese, caramelized onions, and grilled jalapeños.
Finish with chopped cilantro if desired, then drizzle with chicken broth and olive oil.

axes.primaryIngredient: corn arepa filled with mozarella cheese
